description:
A simplified touch optimized interface for QGIS in the field.


What's Changed
- Add a show password button to the password field within the NTRIP configuration popup
- Increase compatibility with more NTRIP servers
- Fix auto reconnection to a BLE GNSS device when returning from locked screen
- Fix fill ring geometry editor showing a blank feature addition form
- Adopt cloud project owner name when the project author is 'root'
- Fix overly compressed photos taken by QField's own camera
- Fix erroneous spikes in line and polygon geometries when tracking positions
- Display range editor widget suffix when configured to a non-empty value
- Fix attachment file name generation when using the quick snap/record button in the new gallery editor widget
Android-specific changes
- Fix Android crash on launch due to accessing null object on some Xiaomi devices
iOS-specific changes
- Add ability to import projects and datasets from phone and iCloud storage
Full Changelog: v4.2.1...v4.2.2
